source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A marble with radius $15 \mathrm{~cm}$ fits exactly under a cone as shown in the diagram. The slant height of the cone is equal to the diameter of its base. What is the height of the cone in $\mathrm{cm}$ ? <image1>

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says 'as shown in the diagram'
geometry setup appears to rely on the visual configuration of a marble fitting exactly under a cone
multi_step: must combine at least two geometric conditions: marble radius 15 cm and cone slant height equals base diameter
likely requires deriving cone dimensions from an inscribed/tangent configuration rather than direct lookup
answer_type is numeric and there are no choices, so solving likely needs explicit geometric reasoning
verifiability: answer_text is a single explicit value: 45
geometric constraints can be checked by deriving cone height from the stated relations

decision_reasons: question, image, and numeric answer are all present, so the core semantic assets are intact
asset registry passed with no recorded issues
high image dependency is acceptable here because the required diagram asset exists
multi-step and verifiable geometry problem with a clear explicit answer
